lastSummary: Reviewed the 10:01-11:01 AM EDT window and found no new user-facing mission-control/task changes beyond the already logged token-governance work.
Recorded passive continuity state instead: the one-hour token audit started at 10:47 AM EDT is still running, and its output folder currently contains only manifest.json plus start.json.
Reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files, found no pending shared-important promotions, and refreshed their review stamps before the immediate git auto-sync step.
